# EventIQN

> AI-ready attribution and event ingest: measure apps, web, CTV, and more with campaign links, SDKs, and a dashboard for projects, API keys, and analytics.

EventIQN apps send events to the ingest API. Humans use the dashboard SPA to create projects, issue API keys, build tracking links, and review events. Agents should ask for `companyId`, ingest `endpoint`, and a dashboard-generated API key — never invent keys or commit production secrets.

## Product

- [EventIQN homepage](https://eventiqn.trusttargets.com/): Product overview and waitlist for invite-only dashboard access
- [Sign in](https://eventiqn.trusttargets.com/login): Dashboard login for invited users
- [Privacy policy](https://eventiqn.trusttargets.com/privacy): Privacy terms for the product and site
- [Terms of service](https://eventiqn.trusttargets.com/terms): Legal terms of use

## SDKs and downloads

- [Web SDK (browser script)](https://eventiqn.trusttargets.com/sdk.js): Hosted browser SDK; call `EventIQN.init({ apiKey, companyId, endpoint })`
- [iOS SDK zip](https://eventiqn.trusttargets.com/downloads/eventiqn-ios-sdk.zip): Native iOS SDK sources for install and deep-link attribution
- [Android SDK zip](https://eventiqn.trusttargets.com/downloads/eventiqn-android-sdk.zip): Kotlin Android SDK with Play Install Referrer support

## API

- [Ingest health check](https://api.eventiqn.trusttargets.com/healthz): Liveness probe for the ingest/API host
- [Ingest API base](https://api.eventiqn.trusttargets.com/): Production ingest and dashboard API origin (`POST /v1/session/bootstrap`, `POST /v1/record`, auth and project routes)

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://eventiqn.trusttargets.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of public pages
- [Robots](https://eventiqn.trusttargets.com/robots.txt): Crawler directives for the marketing site
